violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the cold drawer of prep unit #3 on the Bar'Cino cookline. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The floors in the downstairs walk-in cooler are constructed of un-sealed cement, which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2027

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils shall be stored in one of the following manners; on a dry clean surface, in water 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient flow to flush away potential contamination. Utensils were removed from water and placed on dry clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The individual cutting boards in the prep kitchen and prep unit cutting boards on the barcino cookline and la vecina kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The connections for the chemical dispensing equipment at the 3-bay sink in the la vecina kitchen were observed to be leaking. Plumbing systems shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
